title: Add Two Numbers
problem_statement: Add two numbers represented by linked lists where each node stores a single digit in reverse order.
constraints: The number of nodes in each list is in the range [1, 100]
intuition: Simultaneously add digits with carry while walking both lists.

approaches.name: Digit-by-digit addition
approaches.description: Traverse both lists in lockstep, sum digits plus carry, and append result nodes.
approaches.why_not: Converting to integers may overflow and loses the linked list structure.

interview_qa.a: Compute carry as sum / 10 and propagate it to the next digit.

interview_qa.q: What if lists are different lengths?
interview_qa.a: Continue processing the remaining digits of the longer list with carry.
